Enterprise Sales · Data & AI

PatrickMeehan

I close seven-figure deals for a SaaS data platform - the kind with 12-month cycles, a turnstile of stakeholders, and procurement teams who make you earn every dollar. My largest deal to date: a $40M multi-year ELA with a global holding company, consolidating 40+ contracts into one.

I'm equally focused on how AI is changing the way enterprise deals get done. I build my own tools, automate my own workflows, and make sure I'm not just watching the shift happen.

Experience
My Resume, In Plain English
“Consolidating 40+ contracts into one ELA”
They had 40+ contracts with us. Hard to manage, harder to grow. I turned it into one ELA - cleaner for them, and it unlocked expansion we'd never have gotten deal by deal.
“Championed internal AI strategy”
How we use AI internally was on the roadmap. An actual plan was not. I developed one - use cases by department, budget, rollout timeline - and successfully pitched it to ELT.
“Own the full revenue lifecycle”
Prospect, demo, commercials, close, expand, renew. I know our platform, APIs, billing, and data methodology well enough that I don't need to loop in an SE for every question.
“Executive alignment in complex accounts”
Big enterprise deals have a lot of people who say they're not the decision-maker. My job is figuring out who actually is - early - and getting them all to say yes at the same time.
“Launched GWI's first MCP server offering”
Saw an opportunity to package our data for AI-native workflows. Built the business case, coordinated with product, and got it greenlit - turning a technical experiment into a revenue play.
Download My Resume
Case Study

I replaced a 10-tab Excel workbook with a self-service quote builder

GWI's custom research quoting process required 7 manual steps across multiple teams. I built a React app that pulls live API data and generates instant, validated quotes.

The Problem

Sales reps spent 2-3 days building recontact quotes using a 10-tab Excel workbook. Each quote required manual data entry, cross-referencing rate cards across currencies, validating feasibility by country, and coordinating with the Solutions team - all before a client ever saw a number.

The Solution

A self-service web application that connects directly to GWI's platform API. Reps paste an audience URL, select markets, and get an instant quote with feasibility checks, timeline estimates, and cost breakdowns - validated against live data in seconds.
